name: Left Whisk
preceding_figure_names: Back Whisk, Basic Weave, Closed Impetus, Contra Check, Fallaway Whisk, Natural Spin Turn, Open Impetus, Open Telemark, Outside Change, Outside Spin, Reverse Turn, Turning Lock, Turning Lock to R, Weave From Promenade Position, Whisk
following_figure_names: Outside Change, Fallaway Whisk, Back Whisk, Outside Spin, Open Impetus, Closed Impetus
notes:
No rise in Left Whisk.
Alternative Alignment - Man start with RF back, BLOD
Variation: Left Whisk on Count 1 with Contra Check
Lady may overturn slightly to L on step 3 and turn her head well to the L.
Man looks towards Lady's face, not over her R shoulder.
Man's RH will lower as the next step is taken.
Lady tends to have a tendency to take her R elbow in, keep elbow slightly out to maintain volume, extend her R arm (give to Man, create room to create shape).
To produce big shape: Take step LF back (along original travel direction, don't go around Man), move weight back to LF (this is a step, otherwise you'll block Man), collect RF (crossed in front of LF, w/o weight).
Butt and hip fwd to Man, don't turn out of Man. Hips stop turning, but body can continue to turn more to shape/sway without changing base.
Contra within own body. Both L and R rib cage and hips fwd to Man and shape to L (w/o turning hips more), R side of body is longer (very stretched). Don't "sit" bottom down, heavy. Pick up center and bottom. Really pick up L side ribs to Man while rotating body to L and extending head to L.
Head turns well to left and extend (without body peeling from Man) to finish the extension. Breathe out to extend head even more.
Keep arm/elbow forward, extend the arm fwd to Man (check R elbow angle), give it to Man. Don't break shoulder or peel away shoulder.

steps.action: RF fwd and across in PP and CBMP | FDW, moving along LOD
comments: Man looks towards Lady's face, not over her R shoulder.
Man's RH will lower as the next step is taken.

steps.action: LF to side and slightly fwd | Pointing DW
comments: Body start to turn L
RF forward, shape to R and close with Man, then R hip glued to Man. Follow hip curve.
Lady tends to have a tendency to take her R elbow in, keep elbow slightly out to maintain volume, extend her R arm (give to Man, create room to create shape)

steps.action: RF crosses behind LF | FDW | T | Body turn to L
comments: Man looks towards Lady's face, not over her R shoulder.
Man's RH will lower as the next step is taken.

steps.action: LF fwd and across in PP and CBMP | Facing DC, moving along LOD | HT | start to turn L
comments: Lady tends to have a tendency to take her R elbow in, keep elbow slightly out to maintain volume, extend her R arm (give to Man, create room to create shape)

To produce big shape: Take step LF back (along original travel direction, don't go around Man), move weight back to LF (this is a step, otherwise you'll block Man), collect RF (crossed in front of LF, w/o weight).
Butt and hip fwd to Man, don't turn out of Man. Hips stop turning, but body can continue to turn more to shape/sway without changing base.

Contra within own body. Both L and R rib cage and hips fwd to Man and shape to L (w/o turning hips more), R side of body is longer (very stretched). Don't "sit" bottom down, heavy. Pick up center and bottom. Really pick up L side ribs to Man while rotating body to L and extending head to L.
Head turns well to left and extend (without body peeling from Man) to finish the extension. Breathe out to extend head even more.
Keep arm/elbow forward, extend the arm fwd to Man (check R elbow angle), give it to Man. Don't break shoulder or peel away shoulder.

steps.action: RF to side and slightly back | BDW
comments: 3/8 btwn 1-2
RF forward, shape to R and close with Man. Follow hip curve.
Lady tends to have a tendency to take her R elbow in, keep elbow slightly out to maintain volume, extend her R arm (give to Man, create room to create shape)
1/8 btwn 2-3

To produce big shape: Take step LF back (along original travel direction, don't go around Man), move weight back to LF (this is a step, otherwise you'll block Man), collect RF (crossed in front of LF, w/o weight).
Butt and hip fwd to Man, don't turn out of Man. Hips stop turning, but body can continue to turn more to shape/sway without changing base.

Contra within own body. Both L and R rib cage and hips fwd to Man and shape to L (w/o turning hips more), R side of body is longer (very stretched). Don't "sit" bottom down, heavy. Pick up center and bottom. Really pick up L side ribs to Man while rotating body to L and extending head to L.
Head turns well to left and extend (without body peeling from Man) to finish the extension. Breathe out to extend head even more.
Keep arm/elbow forward, extend the arm fwd to Man (check R elbow angle), give it to Man. Don't break shoulder or peel away shoulder.
Lady may overturn slightly to L on step 3 and turn her head well to the L.
